privacyBoundary: This manifest indexes tracked repo artifacts only. It does not read local-only memory, raw chat databases, private runtime state, or secret files.

fidelityClasses.label: Raw native export
fidelityClasses.description: Unmodified transcript exported directly from the source tool.

fidelityClasses.label: Provider/session export
fidelityClasses.description: A provider or runtime session export with source metadata and no assistant reconstruction.

fidelityClasses.label: Reconstructed near-verbatim transcript
fidelityClasses.description: A high-fidelity reconstruction from visible context. Useful evidence, but not a native transcript.

fidelityClasses.label: Summary/checkpoint
fidelityClasses.description: A handoff or checkpoint preserving decisions, context, and next steps without claiming full transcript fidelity.

fidelityClasses.label: Extracted doctrine
fidelityClasses.description: A promoted lesson, doctrine, or decision extracted from a conversation or transcript.

ingestPaths.privacyBoundary: Local/private by default. Only metadata and explicitly written repo handoffs enter tracked repo truth.
ingestPaths.nextTrigger: When a long main-session chat closes, save a handoff or full-convo artifact and regenerate the manifest.

ingestPaths.privacyBoundary: Use SRC-MEETINGS-001 and shared communication artifacts. Broad team/agent query access remains separately gated.
ingestPaths.nextTrigger: Current-day meeting sync or meeting-transcript backfill writes local archive/ledger rows.

ingestPaths.privacyBoundary: Existing governed sync lanes read approved source data and write local archive/ledger rows only.
ingestPaths.nextTrigger: Current-day shared-comms sync captures thread artifacts or source_crawl item evidence.

ingestPaths.privacyBoundary: No external upload. Native transcript import must preserve source, session id, timestamps, and redaction posture.
ingestPaths.nextTrigger: Build only when a native transcript export is available or a provider/runtime exposes a safe local export.
